description.en: Limits on the number of entries represented for the named object type. The default is 4 for maxdict, 5 for maxarray, and 6 for the others.

excerpt.es: Limits on the number of entries represented for the named object type. The default is 4 for maxdict, 5 for maxarray, and 6 for the others.
excerpt.en: Limits on the number of entries represented for the named object type. The default is 4 for maxdict, 5 for maxarray, and 6 for the others.

description.en: Depth limit on the creation of recursive representations. The default is 6.

excerpt.es: Depth limit on the creation of recursive representations. The default is 6.
excerpt.en: Depth limit on the creation of recursive representations. The default is 6.

description.en: Maximum number of characters in the representation for an integer. Digits are dropped from the middle. The default is 40.

excerpt.es: Maximum number of characters in the representation for an integer. Digits are dropped from the middle. The default is 40.
excerpt.en: Maximum number of characters in the representation for an integer. Digits are dropped from the middle. The default is 40.

description.en: This limit is used to control the size of object types for which no specific formatting method is available on the Repr object. It is applied in a similar manner as maxstring. The default is 20.

excerpt.es: This limit is used to control the size of object types for which no specific formatting method is available on the Repr object. It is applied in a similar manner as maxstring. The default is 20.
excerpt.en: This limit is used to control the size of object types for which no specific formatting method is available on the Repr object. It is applied in a similar manner as maxstring. The default is 20.

description.en: Limit on the number of characters in the representation of the string. Note that the “normal” representation of the string is used as the character source: if escape sequences are needed in the representation, these may be mangled when the representation is shortened. The default is 30.
